Welcome To
Armaghan-e-Najaf

A Drop in the Ocean

Armaghan-e-Najaf, a non profit organization, committed to improving the lives of underserved communities through a multifaceted approach encompassing education, medical assistance, and daily life support. Since its inception in 2012, the foundation has made significant strides in uplifting communities and creating sustainable impact.

READ MORE

Become a Volunteer

We are seeking individuals to become volunteers.

Make Donation

We encourage everyone to make a donation to support us.

Build Shelter for Other

Volunteers are coming together to build a shelter for others in the community who are experiencing homelessness.

Be the part to help others!

Team Armaghan-e-Najaf committed to improving the lives of underserved community members through a multifaceted approach encompassing  education, medical assistance, flood relief, construction of houses, masjids and daily life support.

Get

INVOLVED

There are many ways you can get involved with us, from volunteering to donating.

Get Involved

Give

DONATION

We encourage everyone to make a donation to support us
